name: Della Robbia Ice Ring
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the fruits as follows:
- Canned apricot halves (drained)
- Seedless Green Grapes
- Strawberries
- Maraschino Cherries
- Strips of Orange Peel (curled)
- Mint Leaves
2. Mix the ginger ale and lemon juice together.
3. Pour an inch of the mixture into a decorative mold.
4. Add layers of fruit, more liquid, and continue freezing.
5. If the fruit tends to float in the liquid, freeze the mold between each layer of fruit before adding the next layer of liquid.
